name: Number 32: Shark Drake
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>Ｎｏ．</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ナンバーズ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>３２ <ruby lang="jp"><rb>海</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>かい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>咬</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>こう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>龍</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>りゅう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>シャーク・ドレイク
name_jp_tl: Numbers 32: Marine Biting Dragon - Shark Drake
desc:
3 Level 4 monsters
Once per turn, when this attacking card destroys an opponent's monster by battle and sends it to the GY: You can detach 1 material from this card; Special Summon the destroyed monster to your opponent's field in Attack Position (but it loses 1000 ATK), and if you do, this card can make a second attack during this Battle Phase.

3 Level 4 monsters

action: Activates if it destroys a monster by battle
summoning: Does not require specific Xyz Materials
Special Summons from your opponent's Graveyard to your opponent's field
